text: For the safety of the personnel working with fire hoses, the fire pumps are fitted with a:

options.text: Mechanical safety clutch linkage on driving engines
Pressure gauge and relief valve on the discharge side
Flexible expansion joint directly on the water suction intake

explanation: Fire pumps are equipped with pressure gauges to monitor discharge pressure and relief valves to prevent over-pressurization, which could damage the pump, hoses, or injure personnel. This is a critical safety feature ensuring stable operation.
